summary: Comprehensive testing of Plumage Capital Strategy Lab completed. All core features working correctly including EMI simulator, prepayment strategies (periodic and adhoc), investment comparison analysis with breakdown by source, and the key 'Net Cost (Invest Strategy)' third line in Cumulative Interest chart.
passed_tests: EMI below standard correctly rejected (400 error)
Adhoc Lump Sum Payments - 5L payment saves interest
Investment breakdown by source (EMI adjustment, periodic, adhoc)
Recommendation: Prepay vs Invest logic correct
Input validation - negative loan amount rejected
Closing balance reaches zero at loan end
Frontend loads with default values (₹50L, 8.5%, 20 years)
Run Simulation button triggers API and displays results
Investment comparison analysis displays when return > 0
Cumulative Interest chart shows THREE lines (Original, Optimized, Net Cost)
'Net Cost (Invest Strategy)' legend visible in chart
Helper text 'Blue line shows net cost' visible
Investment breakdown by source displays (periodic payments)
Prepay vs Invest recommendation displays correctly
Excel and PDF export buttons functional
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. The key 'Net Wealth Comparison' feature (third line in Cumulative Interest chart) is implemented correctly - it shows 'Net Cost (Invest Strategy)' as a blue dashed line when investment_return > 0 and prepayments are configured. The investment breakdown by source (EMI adjustment, periodic, adhoc) works correctly. To see the full functionality: 1) Enable Advanced Optimization, 2) Add periodic or adhoc payments, 3) Set investment return > 0 (default 12%), 4) Run simulation, 5) Click Cumulative Interest tab.

EMI_Simulator.form_inputs: Working - loan amount, interest rate, tenure, date, type

Prepayment_Strategies.emi_adjustment: Working - increases reduce tenure and interest

Investment_Comparison.breakdown_by_source: Working - EMI, periodic, adhoc tracked separately
Investment_Comparison.recommendation: Working - Prepay vs Invest logic correct

Cumulative_Interest_Chart.three_lines: Working - Original, Optimized, Net Cost (Invest Strategy)
Cumulative_Interest_Chart.net_cost_line: Working - blue dashed line appears when enabled
